gist.headline: Riko joins the chat
gist.blurb: Meet Riko, the newest Discord bot in our showcase, bringing moderation and fun to your server.
gist.summary: Added Riko to the Social Bots category, offering users a new tool for server moderation and entertainment.
gist.impact: Community managers can now utilize Riko for automated moderation and utility features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee welcoming a new robot character (Riko) into a cozy digital chat room. Riko represents the new Discord bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the Bee welcoming a new sleek robot friend named Riko into a digital clubhouse. Riko holds a tiny pixelated shield. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'HELLO RIKO'. Nostalgic and cute.
